metadata.methodology: City-level search across Boise, Coeur d'Alene / Post Falls, Idaho Falls, and Pocatello with homepage/contact extraction plus selective source-code contact recovery

candidates.notes: Family-owned Boise laser etching and engraving business serving awards, corporate gifts, glass, metal, plexiglass, and wood applications.
Treasure Valley custom laser cutting and engraving shop handling tumblers, glassware, cutting boards, business signs, and custom project work.

candidates.address: 1602-A E. Seltice Way, Post Falls, ID 83854
candidates.notes: North Idaho awards and custom laser engraving business serving the Spokane area as well, with good direct contact depth and commercial labeling capability.
Idaho Falls awards, stamps, name badges, and engraving shop with a clear public address and phone plus established local positioning.
Coeur d'Alene engraving and awards business with strong local relevance and surfaced direct phone contact, though public address/email detail was lighter than the strongest Idaho records.
Pocatello sign company with custom fabricated signs and a clean direct contact block. Useful southeast Idaho commercial signage record.

Regional sign and consulting business serving Pocatello, Chubbuck, Blackfoot, and Idaho Falls with banners, graphics, and custom signage. Regional rather than single-city, but still a good commercial record.
